sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Turn your eyes, O God, our shield; and look on the face of your anointed one; one day within your courts is better than a thousand elsewhere.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: My sheep hear my voice, says the Lord; I know them, and they follow me.

sections.title: I Will Choose Christ
sections.author: Jaime Cortez
sections.snippet: I will choose Christ, I will choose love, I choose to serve. I give my heart, I give my life, I give my all to you.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: With the Lord there is mercy; in him is plentiful redemption.

sections.title: My Soul Rejoices
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: My God is mighty; he has done great things for me. Holy is his name. My God is mercy; hope to set the nations free. Holy is his name. For he has remembered.

sections.title: Holy is the Name
sections.author: Sarah Hart, Jesse Manibusan, Steve Angrisano
sections.snippet: Love, you fall into our darkness, light upon these shadow lands. Love, you reach when we are farthest, reach with your forgiving hand. How can we keep from singing? How can we keep from singing?

sections.title: Holy Forever
sections.author: Chris Tomlin
sections.snippet: A thousand generations falling down to worship; to sing the song of ages to the Lamb. And all who've gone before us and all who will believe; will sing the song of ages to the Lamb.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
